title: Infinity Injections
description: This Addon features lots of crazy superpowers and abilities and is based off the infinity injections in the InsaneCraft Series.
body:
## 💉 Infinity Injections

This Addon Is Based Of The Infinity Injection Seen In the InsaneCraft Series. **Infinity Injections** is a Forge 1.12.2 addon that introduces a modular injection system, enabling players to access custom superpowers and enhancements. 

This addon does **not** function on its own and requires specific mods to be installed. Please refer to the dependencies section for details.

---

## 🧩 Features

* Adds a modular **injection system** designed to enhance a players experience
* Built to **extend supported mods** with new superpowers and abilities
* Lightweight and designed to integrate seamlessly into modpacks

---

## 📥 Installation

1. Download **Infinity Injections** from this Modrinth page
2. Download all **required mods** listed under the **Requirements** tab
3. Navigate to:
   `%appdata% > .minecraft > addonpacks` (if there is no addonpacks folder create one)
4. Place the downloaded `.jar` file into the `addonpacks` folder
5. Launch Minecraft with **Forge 1.12.2**

---

## ❗ Requirements

- [Lucraft Core](https://modrinth.com/project/4h2aTE5G)
- [Heroes Expansion](https://modrinth.com/project/BgGyndL5)
- [The Fifth World](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/the-fifth-world)
- [Speedster Heroes](https://modrinth.com/project/bApyjH1r)
- [Infinity Craft](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/infinity-craft)
- [Star Tech, Man! The Legendary Mod?](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/star-tech-man-the-legendary-mod)
- [Draconic Evolution](https://modrinth.com/project/nBqivi8H)
- [PlusTic](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/plusticminusbad)
- [Avaritia](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/avaritia-1-10)
- [Weather2](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/weather-storms-tornadoes)
- [Mowzie's Mobs](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/mowzies-mobs)
- [HarvestCraft](https://modrinth.com/project/FK1iFY2x)

---
